description_long: This object depicts a humanoid figure with a bald head and a military-style uniform, featuring a tactical vest and camouflage-patterned clothing. The figure's arms are highly exaggerated, extending outward in long, flat, wing-like shapes that appear unnatural and distorted. The boots are robust and suggest a utilitarian, rugged design suitable for outdoor or combat environments. The head and neck are disproportionately small compared to the rest of the body, and the shoulders are broad, further emphasizing the abnormal proportions. The overall appearance is surreal, with the extended arms dominating the silhouette and creating a striking, almost creature-like presence. The figure's posture is upright, but the anatomical distortions make it appear otherworldly and unsettling.
description: A bald humanoid in military-style clothing with extremely elongated, wing-like arms and a tactical vest, standing upright. The figure's proportions are highly distorted, giving it a surreal and unsettling appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bald head, tactical vest, and the full span of the elongated, wing-like arms extending outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extreme length and flatness of the left arm, as well as the profile of the head and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vest, the camouflage pants, and the full extension of both arms from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the right arm's exaggerated length and the side profile of the figure's body and head.
attribute_clothing_type: military-style uniform with tactical vest and camouflage pants
